import React from 'react' import './Design.css' function Project() { return (


Projects

University Management System

A comprehensive software solution facilitating efficient administration, student management, academic processes, and resource coordination in educational institutions


Book Store

A digital platform enabling users to browse, purchase, and manage awide range of books, enhancing accessibility and convenience in book shopping


Quiz App

A digital platform enabling users to engage in interactive quizzes, offering diverse question sets, real-time feedback, and customizable features for enhanced learning and entertainment.


Portfolio

Aportfolio project is a concise showcase of an individual's skills, accomplishments, and completed works. It includes diverse samples, such as websites, designs, or writing pieces, demonstrating technical expertise and creativity


BMI Calculator

I developed a BMI calculator using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, which accurately calculates and categorizes BMI based on user input. The project features a responsive design, ensuring seamless usability across various devices.

) } export default Project
